sourceRef: tip:Handling a late-term credit change cleanly

slides.headline: Cleanly handle late-term credit changes
slides.body: Avoid a mess when students drop during term.

slides.headline: Review the student's SAP plan
slides.body: Ensure they meet term eligibility requirements.
bullets: Check the SAP plan for term enrollment.
Verify the student's status is ‘active’ or ‘incomplete’.

slides.headline: Submit a form
slides.body: Complete the appropriate form for the change.
bullets: Use VA Form 22-1999 for term changes.
Follow the instructions in the Student Aid Guide.

slides.headline: Maintain accurate records
slides.body: Keep all related documents for future reference.
bullets: Update the student's file with notes.

slides.headline: Review your records
slides.body: Ensure your actions align with VA guidelines.
bullets: Refer to the SAA letter for guidance.
Check if the change meets the 85/15 rule.

slides.headline: Approve or deny
slides.body: Submit the form for review by the State Approving Agency.
bullets: Follow the COE guidelines for the decision.

slides.body: Learn more about handling late-term credit changes. Link in bio.
slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Master the two-step recovery when a student drops during term with this compliance tip.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is the first one, as it could benefit from a more engaging headline to grab the viewer's attention.
